hero.sub: Growing companies get stuck on disconnected tools and manual processes. We replace that mess with AI that actually works. Built for your situation.

pain.title: Does this sound familiar?
pain.sub: If any of these situations ring a bell, TTS is the right partner for you.

cards.d: You're paying for 5 separate SaaS subscriptions that don't talk to each other. Data is everywhere and nowhere.
Your team spends hours every week moving data between systems. Work that AI can do in seconds.
You tried AI: a tool, a freelancer, a demo. It never made it to production.
Revenue is growing, but your processes can't keep up. Hiring more people isn't the answer.
Vacancies stay open too long. Ad spend is high and opaque. You don't know what a hire actually costs.
You're stuck in operations. You know AI can help, but you don't know where to start without risk.

services.title: Our services
services.sub: Four ways to make AI work in your organization.

items.d: Agents that connect to your systems and execute tasks independently. Without you having to be involved every time. From lead qualification to invoice management.
Workflows that take pressure off the teams you want to grow. Data that moves from A to B automatically. Reports that write themselves.
One system that replaces all your separate tools. Built for how your business works, not the other way around. From first idea to live platform.
We temporarily become part of your team. Together we discover where AI has the most impact, build the roadmap and make sure it actually goes live.

process.title: From first conversation to working AI
process.sub: A clear trajectory without surprises. Weekly updates, no black box.

steps.d: We explore together where your biggest operational pain is and what AI can realistically solve.
We design a concrete approach: what we build, how fast, what it costs and what it delivers.
We build and test. You get a weekly update and can steer along. No surprises at delivery.
We deliver and remain available. No closing a project and walking away. We stick around.

urgency.title: The cost of waiting is no longer theoretical.

blocks.d: SMB companies implementing AI now are building an operational lead that's hard to catch up with.
Building an in-house AI team costs a year and hundreds of thousands. A partnership with TTS costs a fraction and delivers results faster.
What used to cost €500K now costs €50K. A custom-built AI solution is cheaper than the SaaS stack you have now.
